eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED WEEKLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Minnesota; at 5:49 AM on AUG 15, 2019 Effective until 6:04 AM. Message from MN BCA.
extra_text: This is a weekly test of the Emergency Alert System by the Minnesota Bureau of Criminal Apprehension. This is only a test. No action is needed. This is only a test.
